## Type of Change

- [ ] New content (new section or chapter)
- [ ] Content expansion (adding to an existing section)
- [ ] Correction (factual error, outdated reference, broken link)
- [ ] Typo or formatting fix

---

## Checklist

- [ ] An issue was raised and acknowledged before this PR was opened
- [ ] Changes are scoped to a single topic or fix
- [ ] All factual claims have footnote citations with full citation format
- [ ] New sources are added to `docs/11-sources.md`
- [ ] Tone is consistent with the rest of the guide (pragmatic, direct, experience-based)
- [ ] Markdown conventions are followed (heading levels, tables, code blocks)
- [ ] Navigation links are correct (top and bottom of modified files)
- [ ] `README.md` Table of Contents updated if a chapter was added or renamed
- [ ] No broken links (tested locally or via link checker)
